<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/en.php', [ 'meridiem' => ['TOO', 'MUU'], 'weekdays' => ['Jumapíiri', 'Jumatátu', 'Jumaíne', 'Jumatáano', 'Alamíisi', 'Ijumáa', 'Jumamóosi'], 'weekdays_short' => ['Píili', 'Táatu', 'Íne', 'Táano', 'Alh', 'Ijm', 'Móosi'], 'weekdays_min' => ['Píili', 'Táatu', 'Íne', 'Táano', 'Alh', 'Ijm', 'Móosi'], 'months' => ['Kʉfúngatɨ', 'Kʉnaanɨ', 'Kʉkeenda', 'Kwiikumi', 'Kwiinyambála', 'Kwiidwaata', 'Kʉmʉʉnchɨ', 'Kʉvɨɨrɨ', 'Kʉsaatʉ', 'Kwiinyi', 'Kʉsaano', 'Kʉsasatʉ'], 'months_short' => ['Fúngatɨ', 'Naanɨ', 'Keenda', 'Ikúmi', 'Inyambala', 'Idwaata', 'Mʉʉnchɨ', 'Vɨɨrɨ', 'Saatʉ', 'Inyi', 'Saano', 'Sasatʉ'], 'first_day_of_week' => 1, 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'HH:mm', 'LTS' => 'HH:mm:ss', 'L' => 'DD/MM/YYYY', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', 'LLLL' => 'dddd, D MMMM YYYY HH:mm', ], ]);
